title: Counting Cells Not Empty
excerpt: Is there a way to count the cells in a row that are not empty. For example I am in Column B & Row 1 and I want to count all the celts to the right of Column B & Row 1. Since CountIf is not yet a feature, is there a way i…

posts.author: GlobeCoRe (Stephen Sundae)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to count the cells in a row that are not empty. For example I am in Column B & Row 1 and I want to count all the celts to the right of Column B & Row 1. Since CountIf is not yet a feature, is there a way i can work around this?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Stephen,

It depends on the type of column, but if they are text fields, for instance, you could create a formula like this:

SUM(IF({Text 1}="",1,0),IF({Text 2}="",1,0),IF({Text 3}="",1,0))
